name: Manhattan Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add the onion and cook until translucent, about 7 minutes.
2. Add carrots and celery; continue cooking for 5 minutes more. Stir in parsley, tomatoes, water, salt, black pepper, white pepper, bay leaf, and thyme.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 40 minutes.
4. Add potatoes and cook until tender but not mushy, about 20 minutes.
5. Stir in nutritional yeast and wakami; cook an additional 10 minutes.
6. Remove bay leaf, taste, and adjust seasoning if needed. Serve hot, topped with crumbled wakami.
Note: Discard the bay leaf before serving.
